Argument Reference

  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) A user-friendly display name for the load balancer.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for the load balancer.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for the load balancer.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • shape_name - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • subnet_ids - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • shape_details - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • is_private - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • ip_mode - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • reserved_ips - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • listeners - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • hostnames - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • backend_sets - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • network_security_group_ids - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • certificates - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • ssl_cipher_suites - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • path_route_sets - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • rule_sets - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
